## Checklist
- [ ] `npm test` passes (all tests green)
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` exits 0
- [ ] `npm run lint` exits 0
- [ ] New endpoints have tests in `api.test.ts`
- [ ] Zod schemas have plain-language error messages
- [ ] Feature-flagged where school-specific
- [ ] No `.env` or secrets committed
- [ ] `ARCHITECTURE.md` updated if new bounded context added
